description:
About this item
5-Tier L-Shaped Bookshelf: This ladder-style bookshelf, with its 5-tier structure, offers practical storage for any room, enhancing your space throughout your home
Versatile Bookcase: This compact unit not only serves as a bookcase, but also as a display rack, storage shelf, plant stand, baker's rack, and kitchen utility shelf. A practical addition for any home
Space-Saving Design: With dimensions of 59"L * 70"H * 11.8"W, this corner bookshelf maximizes limited space, perfectly fitting in your room without taking up much space, suitable for the living room, bedroom, study, or kitchen
Sturdy Construction: This bookshelf boasts a robust metal frame and particle board structure, sporting a timeless simplicity that matches any home or office. Adjustable feet keep it stable and protect your floor from scratches
